sourceMovie.title: American Assassin
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit American Assassin for the same reason it broke through in 2017: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a adventure rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Michael Cuesta keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Jackal
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If American Assassin clicked for you, The Jackal (1997) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after American Assassin?
faq.answer: Try The Jackal, Weekend in Taipei, The Sum of All Fears—each shares DNA with American Assassin while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is American Assassin?
faq.answer: American Assassin (2017) is best described as Action, Adventure, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is American Assassin worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
